summary: PART I Our Business Marqetas mission is modernizing financial services by making the entire payment experience native and delightful. Marqetas modern platform empowers our customers to create customized and innovative payment card programs, giving them configurability and flexibility. When our customers come to us to build a payments solution, they are not just building a card, they are building a payments experience.
